gpu.name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3060 Laptop GPU
gpu.note: RTX 3060 LAPTOP GPU with 6 GB VRAM — NOT the 12 GB desktop RTX 3060. The 8B row (8.7 GB Q8_0) does not fit GPU-resident on 6 GB and is deferred to a 12 GB host; it is NOT validated here.

model.geometry: n_layer 28, n_head 16, n_head_kv 8, embedding 2048, head_dim 128, tied embeddings, qk_norm, rope_freq_base 1e6

comparator.note: On-disk Windows CPU comparator (same as the Windows x86 Qwen3 CPU bundles). The GPU-resident CUDA decode is compared against this CPU reference (transitively llama.cpp); correctness proof is GPU output == camelid cpu_reference output == llama.cpp. Differs from the 5d56eff pinned in the macOS/Ubuntu Qwen3 bundles.

camelid.proof_note: Correctness proof: GPU-resident CUDA decode output == camelid cpu_reference output (CAMELID_CUDA_RESIDENT_DECODE=0 on the same binary) == llama.cpp comparator, token-AND-text-identical at the listed token counts. The CPU reference path is independently bit-exact to llama.cpp (the committed Windows x86 CPU bundles).

prompt_pack: 3 confident probes (capital-of-France, say-hello, 2+2). The default "Name a primary color." probe is a documented frontier near-tie (~0.62/0.38 at the close-vs-continue decision); GPU reduction order closes the list while CPU/llama continue — both valid. See qwen3-1.7b-primarycolor-tie.json. Large-context single-shot GPU prefill exercised; see large-context-prefill.json.

api_smoke.models_load: PASS (serve --model startup load; GPU resident engine built, all layers in VRAM)
api_smoke.v1_chat_completions: PASS (exercised by the parity harness on the GPU-resident path)

claim_boundary: Supported exact-row smoke for this exact Qwen3 Q8_0 GGUF on Windows x86_64 (MSVC) with the GPU-resident CUDA decode engine on the recorded RTX 3060 Laptop (6 GB) / driver 576.83 / CUDA 12.9. ChatML chat, thinking DISABLED, short-chat envelope. GPU-resident decode AND single-shot GPU prefill token+text identical to the camelid cpu_reference (transitively llama.cpp) at the listed token counts on the listed prompts. NOT claimed: the 8B row (does not fit 6 GB), other Qwen3 sizes/variants/quants, base variants, Qwen3-MoE (A3B), model-native/long context beyond the recorded resident KV cap, thinking-mode, other GPUs/drivers/CUDA versions (results are GPU/driver/CUDA-version specific), or production throughput.
